title: thelymitra nervosa
intro: Thelymitra nervosa, commonly known as the Nerve Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Thelymitra nervosa are said to include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle cramps, as well as its potential to reduce pain and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the root and rhizome, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or tincture for medicinal use.
